ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tools_services" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool or service */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool or service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool or service */,
  "brc_domain" TEXT /* BRC domain where the tool or service is hosted */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or service */,
  "tool_type" TEXT /* Type of the tool or service (e.g., alignment, assembly) */,
  "input_format" TEXT /* Input format of the tool or service */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Output format of the tool or service */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL of the tool or service documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_parameters" (
  "tool_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool parameter */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool or service */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_status" (
  "job_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job status entry */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool or service */,
  "jobs_submitted" INTEGER /* Number of jobs submitted */,
  "jobs_completed" INTEGER /* Number of jobs completed */,
  "jobs_failed" INTEGER /* Number of jobs failed */,
  "avg_run_time" INTEGER /* Average run time in seconds */,
  "total_memory_used" INTEGER /* Total memory used in bytes */,
  "total_cpu_time" INTEGER /* Total CPU time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_status_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools_services ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_limits" (
  "input_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input limit entry */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool or service */,
  "input_limit" TEXT /* Input limit for the tool or service */,
  "input_limit_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the input limit (e.g., bytes, sequences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_limits_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools_services ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Lab name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency of the project */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tool_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool or service */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "jobs_submitted" INTEGER /* Number of jobs submitted */,
  "jobs_completed" INTEGER /* Number of jobs completed */,
  "jobs_failed" INTEGER /* Number of jobs failed */,
  "avg_run_time" INTEGER /* Average run time in seconds */,
  "total_memory_used" INTEGER /* Total memory used in bytes */,
  "total_cpu_time" INTEGER /* Total CPU time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tool_usage_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools_services ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tool_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tool or service */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool or service */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools_services ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_versions" (
  "tool_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool version */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool or service */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool or service */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_versions_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools_services ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_datasets" (
  "tool_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool dataset */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool or service */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., genome, transcriptome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_datasets_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools_services ("tool_id")
)
